name: @drakonkat/neural-memory
description: MCP Server for Neural Memory - Unified memory with Session Management and Skills Framework

scripts.inspect: cross-env DANGEROUSLY_OMIT_AUTH=true CLIENT_PORT=5689 SERVER_PORT=8512 npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector node src/index.js
scripts.inspect-publish: cross-env DANGEROUSLY_OMIT_AUTH=true CLIENT_PORT=5689 SERVER_PORT=8512  npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector npx -y @drakonkat/neural-memory@latest
